title: The Black Death
puzzle: How did one plague reshape society far beyond health alone?
insight: The Black Death killed so many people across Eurasia that labor systems, religious confidence, trade, and social structures all shifted in response.
key_ideas: Population collapse changed work and wages.
Pandemics expose the hidden structures of daily life.
mind_blower: A disease can become a historical force powerful enough to rearrange economics, culture, and power.
next_curiosity: If pandemics reshape society, what long-term changes do they leave after the crisis fades?
narration_text: How did one plague reshape society far beyond health alone? The Black Death killed so many people across Eurasia that labor systems, religious confidence, trade, and social structures all shifted in response. Population collapse changed work and wages. Fear altered politics and belief. Pandemics expose the hidden structures of daily life. A disease can become a historical force powerful enough to rearrange economics, culture, and power. If pandemics reshape society, what long-term changes do they leave after the crisis fades?
